title: [cross-impl] duplicated IID derivation in lichen-core::addr and lichen-link::identity
description: The ygg_addr_from_pubkey in rust/lichen-core/src/addr.rs:65 duplicates the SHA-256 + U/L bit clear logic from iid_from_pubkey_bytes in rust/lichen-link/src/identity.rs:28. Python _pubkey_to_iid and C lichen_identity_* also implement it. Risk of divergent behavior on future changes (e.g. different hash or bit ops). Must consolidate to single source of truth per cross-impl rules. Matches test/vectors/yggdrasil-derivation.json currently but fragile. See commits ce284558b, 7d084405c.
